zh.lifeSummary: 當Katherine Wright於1469年出生在英國英格蘭艾可達根哈姆時，她的父親Rev Henry Wright II of White Notely45歲，母親Maraeta25歲。她於大約1485年與Samuel Hubbard在英國艾可達根哈姆結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1558年在她的家鄉享年89歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭艾可達根哈姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Katherine Wright于1469年出生在英国英格兰艾可達根哈姆时，她的父亲Rev Henry Wright II of White Notely45岁，母亲Maraeta25岁。她于大约1485年与Samuel Hubbard在英国艾可達根哈姆结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1558年在她的家乡享年89岁，埋葬在英国英格兰艾可達根哈姆。

nameMeanings.name: Wright
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: occupational name for a craftsman or maker of machinery, mostly in wood, of any of a wide range of kinds, from Middle English and Older Scots wriht, wright, wricht, writh, write (Old English wyrhta, wryhta) ‘craftsman’, especially ‘carpenter, joiner’. The term is found in various combinations (for example, Cartwright and Wainwright ), but when used in isolation it often referred to a builder of windmills or watermills. This surname is also very common among African Americans.

variants.name: Wrights
meanings: English: variant of Wright , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Wrightsman
meanings: Probably English (although no longer found in Britain), meaning‘servant of the wright’ (see   Wright  ).

variants.name: Cartwright
meanings: English (Midlands and northern England): occupational name from Middle English cart(e) ‘cart’ + wright(e) ‘craftsman’ (Old English cræt or Old Norse kartr + Old English wyrhta), for a cartwright, a maker of carts.
Variant of   Courtright  , a surname of Dutch origin.

variants.name: Wrightson
meanings: English (northern England, especially Durham): patronymic from   Wright  , meaning ‘son of the wright’.

variants.name: McWright
meanings: Scottish or Irish: Gaelic patronymic with the English and Scots occupational term   Wright  , meaning ‘son of the wright’. The name is possibly a part translation of   McIntyre  , which fully translates as ‘son of the wright’.

variants.name: Wrightman
meanings: English: occupational name from Middle English wright ‘craftsman’ (see Wright ) + man ‘man’, denoting someone who assisted a craftsman.

nameMeanings.name: Katherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Katherine Wright was born in 1469, in Dagenham, Essex, England, United Kingdom, her father, Rev Henry Wright II of White Notely, was 45 and her mother, Maraeta, was 25. She married Samuel Hubbard about 1485, in Dagenham, Essex, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died in 1558, in her hometown, at the age of 89, and was buried in Dagenham, Essex, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Katherine Wright est née en 1469, à Dagenham, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Rev Henry Wright II of White Notely, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Maraeta, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Samuel Hubbard environ 1485, à Dagenham, Essex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1558, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 89 ans, et a été enterrée à Dagenham, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.White Notley, Essex, England, United Kin: White Notley, Essex, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Katherine Wright 1469 in Dagenham, Essex, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Rev Henry Wright II of White Notely 45 und ihre Mutter Maraeta 25. Sie hat um 1485 in Dagenham, Essex, England Samuel Hubbard geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1558 im Alter von 89 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Dagenham, Essex, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lei sposato Samuel Hubbard circa 1485, nel Dagenham, Essex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1558, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 89 anni, e fu sepolta a Dagenham, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Katherine Wrightが1469年にイギリスイギリスエセックスダジェンハムで生まれた時，父Rev Henry Wright II of White Notelyは45歳，母Maraetaは25歳であった。約1485年にイギリスエセックスダジェンハムでSamuel Hubbardと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1558年に故郷で89歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスエセックスダジェンハムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Katherine Wright(이)가 1469년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 다겐함에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Rev Henry Wright II of White Notely(은)는 45세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Maraeta(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 대략 1485년 영국 에세스 다겐함에서 Samuel Hubbard(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1558년 그녀의 고향에서 89세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 다겐함에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Katherine Wright nasceu em 1469, em Dagenham, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Rev Henry Wright II of White Notely, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Maraeta, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Samuel Hubbard aproximadamente 1485, em Dagenham, Essex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1558, em sua cidade natal, com 89 anos, e foi sepultada em Dagenham, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ro.White Notley, Essex, England, United Kin: White Notley, Essex, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Katherine Wright родилась в 1469 г. в местности дадженам, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Rev Henry Wright II of White Notely было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Maraeta, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Samuel Hubbard около 1485 г. в местности дадженам, эссекс, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1558 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 89 лет и была похоронена в местности дадженам, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Katherine Wright nació en 1469, en Dagenham, Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Rev Henry Wright II of White Notely, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Maraeta, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Samuel Hubbard aproximadamente 1485, en Dagenham, Essex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió en 1558, en su pueblo, a la edad de 89 años, y fue sepultada en Dagenham, Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
